source_blueprint.primary_file: Super Saiyans Omega Omni Ai/Super Saiyans Omega Omni Ai.html
source_blueprint.note: Concept blueprint only; this registry does not execute or parse that file at runtime.

core_model.doctrine_translation: OMNAI Monocore and factory language are reused as bounded planning and governance metadata only unless AMK charters live capability.

project_mappings.notes: Pattern literacy capsule; doctrine replicas only unless chartered.
Learning pathway capsule; replicas produce plans and reports.
Module routing doctrine; aligns with distributor advisor.
External connector gate; replicas classify, never open live buses.
Creative media pipeline planning; no provider execution from fabric alone.
Commercial readiness signals; sacred moves stay AMK-gated.
Family-safe creativity lane; child-data flows forbidden without charter.
Symbolic and narrative fabric; report-only default.
Product lane; persistent replicas require AMK decision.
Reference-only unless an approved cross-repo charter exists.

signal_rules.GREEN: All replicas are doctrine, reference, mock, or report only; registry mode is governed; no forbidden capability is enabled.
signal_rules.YELLOW: Optional mapping or sample metadata incomplete; tighten mission notes before widening scope.
signal_rules.BLUE: AMK decision needed for persistent replica stance or external connector lane proposal.
signal_rules.RED: Any live self-replication, deploy, provider, secret, payment, webhook, child-data flow, auto-merge, or other forbidden posture is asserted enabled.

rollback_rules: Remove or disable mission rows that widen scope beyond reports and mocks.
Revert registry JSON to last known GREEN receipt commit.
Re-run npm run z:replica:fabric and attach reports to Overseer notes.
Do not merge fabric changes that introduce runtime agents without charter and receipts.
locked_law: Merge-back requires evidence and AMK approval.
No replica opens external connector lanes; Z-XBUS governs outbound posture.
